speaker: charlie
text: Brilliant stuff Sam. Now Jamie, some excellent news from Australian sport today. <cite index='21-1,21-14'>The Australian Institute of Sport has announced a new partnership with Chobani, supporting athlete performance through evidence-based nutrition</cite>.

speaker: alice
text: Love that Alex! And there's more positive news for women in sport. <cite index='21-5,21-16'>The Australian Sports Commission is strengthening its commitment to gender equity with the launch of a new national mentoring program for women and gender diverse board directors</cite>.

speaker: charlie
text: Plus there's support where it's needed most - <cite index='21-9,21-22'>para athletes preparing for the Commonwealth Games are receiving extra support to address rising costs through new grants from the AIS</cite>. It's great to see our sporting bodies really backing our athletes at every level.
